rows.notes: All extractors agreed; visually confirmed as a clear header with no associated amounts.

rows.description: W.m Heywood pro Bien Caponibus inclusis
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash ('W.m Heywood pro Bien Caponibus inclusis') is visually more accurate for the initial abbreviation and spelling of 'Caponibus' compared to gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from William Heywood for the Little Tew holding, capons included.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from William Heywood for the Little Tew holding, capons included, amounting to £4 5s 8d.

rows.notes: Pounds and shillings agreed. For pence, gpt-5-mini's reading of '4' is visually confirmed; gemini-flash incorrectly interpreted it as blank. The description 'Richard Hiccox pro Bien.' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Richard Hixson'.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from Richard Hiccox for the Little Tew holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from Richard Hiccox for the Little Tew holding, amounting to £3 14s 4d.

rows.notes: Description, pounds, and pence agreed. For shillings, gpt-5-mini's reading of '14' is visually confirmed; gemini-flash's '12' is incorrect. gpt-5-mini's note specifically highlighting '08 14 4' further supports its accuracy for this row's amounts.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from William Taylor and his wife for the Little Tew holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from William Taylor and his wife for the Little Tew holding, amounting to £8 14s 4d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description from gemini-flash ('Rich.d Judge pro Bien') is visually more accurate due to the presence of a period after 'Rich', which gpt-5-mini missed. gpt-5-mini's note about 'ink slightly darker on pence digit but shape clearly '10'' shows good observation, but the amounts were already in consensus.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from Richard Judge for the Little Tew holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from Richard Judge for the Little Tew holding, amounting to £3 10s 10d.

rows.notes: Pounds, shillings, and pence fraction agreed. For pence whole, gpt-5-mini's reading of '11' is visually confirmed; gemini-flash's '1' is incorrect. gpt-5-mini's note explaining the 'trailing loop on the pence that matches the halfpenny 'ob' symbol — interpreted as 11½d' demonstrates better reasoning for the full pence value. The description 'Burdens' (gemini-flash) is visually more accurate than 'Burket' (gpt-5-mini).
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from Brewer Gardner for the Burdens subholding of Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from Brewer Gardner for the Burdens subholding of Little Tew, amounting to £6 9s 11½d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description 'Freane Arundell / Minchin / pro Bien' (gemini-flash) is visually more accurate. gpt-5-mini's note acknowledging 'Surname(s) moderately unclear' and 'Column alignment slightly less precise here (ink light)' is insightful, but the values are clear enough upon direct inspection.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from Freane Arundell for the Minchin subholding of Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from Freane Arundell for the Minchin subholding of Little Tew, amounting to £1 1s 6½d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description 'Brewer Gardner / Hester / pro Bien' (gemini-flash) is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's version ('Gardiner', 'Hesters'). Both models provided good notes on the visual challenges, but the values are still clearly legible.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from Brewer Gardner for the Hester subholding of Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from Brewer Gardner for the Hester subholding of Little Tew, amounting to £1 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description 'Widow. Ryman' (gemini-flash) is visually more accurate, especially the surname spelling and the period after 'Widow', which gpt-5-mini missed and misread as 'Rignam'.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from the widow Ryman for the Little Tew holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from the widow Ryman for the Little Tew holding, amounting to £2 12s 2d.

rows.description: W.m Evans / now Br: Gardiner pro Bien
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed. Description 'W.m Evans / now Br: Gardiner pro Bien' (gemini-flash) is visually more accurate, particularly the surname 'Evans' which was misread as 'Lewis' by gpt-5-mini. The initial 'W.m' and 'Br:' are also more accurately captured by gemini-flash.
rows.english_description: Biennial rent from William Evans (now Brother Gardiner) for the Little Tew holding.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Biennial rent from William Evans (now Brother Gardiner) for the Little Tew holding, amounting to £0 6s 0d.
